test-code.description: skip void/native/abstract methods
skip literal returns
simple failure case
skip complicated returns
skip method calls
#1495 [java] UnnecessaryLocalBeforeReturnOrThrows with assert
#219 ClassCastException in switch case with local variable returned
Detect violation even if not on consecutive lines
No violations on multiple uses of the variable
No violations on multiple uses of the variable - statement order does not matter
#933 UnnecessaryLocalBeforeReturnOrThrows false positive for SuppressWarnings annotation
#282 UnnecessaryLocalBeforeReturnOrThrows false positive when cloning Maps
#310 UnnecessaryLocalBeforeReturnOrThrows enhancement is overly restrictive -- method order matters
#310 UnnecessaryLocalBeforeReturnOrThrows statement order does not matter
#1775 [java] False negative in UnnecessaryLocalBeforeReturnOrThrows when splitting statements across multiple lines
#1804 [java] NPE with fields
FP with captured method reference
FN with lambdas #3275
FN with anonymous classes #3275
[java] UnnecessaryLocalBeforeReturnOrThrows - false positive with catch clause
[java] UnnecessaryLocalBeforeReturnOrThrows false positive when negating variable #2206
#5770 Simple unnecessary local before throw
Variable used elsewhere - no violation
Annotated variable - no violation
Statements not consecutive - no violation when order matters
Throw not using variable - no violation
Variable used in try-catch - no violation
Multiple variables but only one used in throw
Multiple variables but only one used in throw
Throwing field - no violation
Throwing parameter - no violation
Throw in switch statement
Throw in if statement
Throw in try-with-resources
Throw inside for loop block
Throw using lambda expression - no violation
Throw in ternary - no violation
Nested block with unnecessary throw variable
Inner class with throw - no violation
Exception assigned and rethrown inside catch - no violation
Multiple throw variables but one is unnecessary
